title: oreoselinum austriacum
intro: Oreoselinum austriacum, also known as Austriacum parsley fern or Austriacum celery fern, is a type of flowering plant in the carrot family native to Europe. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional European folk medicine, where it is used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Oreoselinum austriacum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be consumed as teas, infusions, or tinctures, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
